overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character walking along a cobblestone mountain path during a heavy storm at night. The environment features rocky cliffs, sparse vegetation, and distant pine forests under dark storm clouds with continuous rainfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pass with wooden barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path through the enclosed rocky mountain pass

entered.detail: tall dark rock face forming the left wall of the mountain pass
rocky outcrop and boulders forming the right boundary of the path
wet cobblestone trail winding through the mountain terrain
leafless gnarled tree trunk beside the path
weathered wooden barrier along the left edge of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view walking through a narrow rocky mountain pass at night during a heavy storm. The path is lined with wooden barriers on the left and rocky cliffs on both sides, with a dead tree visible on the right. Rain falls steadily as the camera moves forward through the enclosed terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with distant pine forest

events.description: exiting enclosed rocky pass into wide open valley with view of distant pine forest

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the landscape opens up to reveal distant forests and mountain peaks

notable_agents.action: standing still on the left side of the path, appearing as a dark humanoid figure

entered.detail: dense cluster of pine trees visible in the valley below
distant mountain silhouette against the stormy sky
patches of brown grass and low vegetation on the right slope

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wide mountain valley revealing distant pine forests and peaks under the stormy night sky. An NPC stands on the left side of the path as the camera passes by. The wooden fence recedes into the distance on the left while grassy terrain appears on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending mountain trail with scattered boulders

events.description: path begins ascending more steeply uphill through open terrain

agents.ego_description: walking uphill on the cobblestone path through increasingly open mountain terrain with scattered rocks

entered.detail: prominent large rock formation beside the path
scattered rocks and boulders covering the right hillside
rocky mountain formation visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The trail continues ascending through open mountain terrain with large boulders scattered along the right side. The distant pine forest shifts to the left as the path curves, while the wooden fence disappears from view. The storm continues with heavy rain and dark clouds covering the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic mountain pass that gradually opens into a vast, storm-swept highland valley. It begins by navigating a narrow rocky corridor lined with wooden barriers and a solitary dead tree under a heavy downpour. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed terrain expands into a wide valley, revealing distant pine forests and jagged peaks while passing a lone NPC standing by the roadside. The scene then shifts as the path curves and ascends, causing the wooden fences to disappear and the distant forests to drift to the left. Finally, the trail leads through open mountain terrain scattered with large boulders under a dark, rain-filled night sky.
